ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the insurance provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the insurance provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the insurance provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the insurance provider */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the provider was established */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating or reputation score of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premiums" (
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance provider */,
  "clean_record" TEXT /* Premium for customers with a clean driving record */,
  "with_1_accident" TEXT /* Premium for customers with one accident */,
  "with_1_dui" TEXT /* Premium for customers with one DUI */,
  "with_1_speeding_violation" TEXT /* Premium for customers with one speeding violation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the premium rates became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the premium rates expire */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the premium rates apply */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, motorcycle) */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., comprehensive, liability) */,
  "discounts" TEXT /* Applicable discounts (e.g., safe driver discount, multi-policy discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premiums_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driving_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driving record type */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of driving record (e.g., Clean, Accident, DUI, Speeding Violation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the driving record type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the driving record (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points associated with the driving record */,
  "impact_on_premium" TEXT /* Percentage impact on the premium due to the driving record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's driving record type */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered with the insurance company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES driving_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance provider */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the premium record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, expired, canceled) */,
  "coverage_amount" TEXT /* Total coverage amount of the policy */,
  "deductible" TEXT /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy is due for renewal */,
  "previous_policy" INTEGER /* ID of the previous policy if the customer has one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_premium_id FOREIGN KEY ("premium_id") REFERENCES premiums ("premium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., collision, theft, medical) */,
  "claim_status_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim status was last updated */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claims adjuster handling the claim */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, actuary, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
